mapper.select:
SELECT p.* FROM experience p
p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.volunteer_id IN (SELECT id FROM volunteer WHERE user_id = #{userId})
AND p.activity_id IN ( SELECT a.id FROM activity a WHERE a.category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT t.category_id FROM ( SELECT a1.category_id FROM activity_registration s JOIN activity a1 ON s.activity_id = a1.id WHERE s.volunteer_id = (SELECT id FROM volunteer WHERE user_id = #{userId}) UNION SELECT a2.category_id FROM user_like f JOIN experience e ON f.target_id = e.id AND f.target_type = 'EXPERIENCE' JOIN activity a2 ON e.activity_id = a2.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT a3.category_id FROM user_like f2 JOIN activity a3 ON f2.target_id = a3.id AND f2.target_type = 'ACTIVITY' WHERE f2.user_id = #{userId} ) t ) )
ORDER BY ( (IFNULL(p.like_count,0) * 3) + (IFNULL(p.collect_count,0) * 5) + (IFNULL(p.comment_count,0) * 2) + (IFNULL(p.view_count,0) * 0.1) ) DESC, p.create_time DESC
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
